entries.description: Remove Marketplace functionality from the OS Images component. This includes removing the `MarketplaceService` and `DomSanitizer` injections, deleting state signals and computed properties related to marketplace items and categories, and removing all methods that handled marketplace logic, simplifying the component to only manage OS image selection.

Update the OS Images page template to remove the Marketplace functionality. This change simplifies the UI by removing the tab navigation for "OS Images" and "Marketplace Apps", updating the title to "Select an OS Image", and removing all HTML code related to displaying marketplace categories and items.
